creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Hiroo Ono from comment #6)
Moin moin

I will remove the VTK option again -- I think this port has already too many (most likely unused options), and is therefore hard to maintain. 

I'm preparing a slimmed down version of it at the moment, less options, but hopefully easier to keep up to date.


mfg Tobias
